Name: ASkeletalMeshActor
Description:
SkeletalMeshActor is an instance of a USkeletalMesh in the world.
  Skeletal meshes are deformable meshes that can be animated and change their geometry at run-time.
  Skeletal meshes dragged into the level from the Content Browser are automatically converted to StaticMeshActors.
  
  @see USkeletalMesh

Variables.Name: bShouldDoAnimNotifies
Variables.Description: Whether or not this actor should respond to anim notifies - CURRENTLY ONLY AFFECTS PlayParticleEffect NOTIFIES

Variables.Name: ReplicatedMesh
Variables.Description: Used to replicate mesh to clients

Variables.Name: ReplicatedPhysAsset
Variables.Description: Used to replicate physics asset to clients

Variables.Name: ReplicatedMaterial0
Variables.Description: used to replicate the material in index 0
